mapper.select: SELECT StaffID AS staffID, StaffName AS staffName, StaffGender AS staffGender, StaffBirthday AS staffBirthday, StaffIDCard AS staffIDCard, StaffDept AS staffDept, StaffTel AS tel, StaffPwd AS password, StaffPosition AS staffPosition, AttendanceStatus AS attendanceStatus, DATE(HireDate) AS hireDate FROM user WHERE StaffTel = #{user.tel} AND StaffPwd = #{user.password}

SELECT StaffID AS staffID, StaffName AS staffName, StaffGender AS staffGender, StaffBirthday AS staffBirthday, StaffIDCard AS staffIDCard, StaffDept AS staffDept, StaffTel AS tel, StaffPwd AS password, StaffPosition AS staffPosition, AttendanceStatus AS attendanceStatus, DATE(HireDate) AS hireDate FROM user WHERE StaffTel = #{value}

SELECT StaffID AS staffID, StaffName AS staffName, StaffGender AS staffGender, StaffBirthday AS staffBirthday, StaffIDCard AS staffIDCard, StaffDept AS staffDept, StaffTel AS tel, StaffPwd AS password, StaffPosition AS staffPosition, AttendanceStatus AS attendanceStatus, DATE(HireDate) AS hireDate FROM user WHERE StaffTel = #{tel}
